title: sphalmanthus longispinulus
intro: Sphalmanthus longispinulus is a succulent plant species in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the "beaked splinterbush" due to its distinctive beaked seed pods and spiny stems. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphalmanthus longispinulus include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. Sphalmanthus longispinulus is often prepared as a decoction or infused as a tea in traditional herbal remedies.
